reason: This lead is not currently in redesign mode.

previewability.reason: The lead is reachable and has enough context for a starter preview.

productionReadiness.reason: Evidence still needs cleanup before production handoff.

redesignValue: Show service coverage, fast response, and quote intent more clearly.
Turn phone or quote actions into the dominant path on mobile.

outreachAngle.hook: Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your roofing in Brisbane, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like.
outreachAngle.observation: Sign/flyer lead: 40 years experience, free in-person inspection and quote. No website provided in input.
outreachAngle.diagnosis: Precision Roof Restore appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible roofing site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion.
